meaning: n.芬斯伯里(英国伦敦一区,位于泰晤士河南岸)
examples: She was often seen in pubs and restaurants in the Finsbury Park and Holloway Road areas.
About 100 people have set up tents in Finsbury Square, a spokesman for the group Bernard Goyder said.
Meanwhile, the Finsbury Square crowd is having trouble getting sleep, says Marek Cichon, 19, who works in the kitchen.
